name: Traffik Traffic Simulator
description: Interactive microscopic traffic simulation visualising what 800 extra cars do to Bergvliet's streets during morning school drop-off at the proposed Tokai High School.

skills.name: Traffic Simulation
skills.description: Runs and visualises a microscopic traffic simulation of the Bergvliet/Tokai road network, comparing baseline and proposed school development scenarios.

skills.name: Scenario Comparison
skills.description: Compare traffic flow, queue lengths, and delay statistics between baseline and development scenarios across multiple corridors.

skills.name: Statistics Export
skills.description: View and export simulation statistics including vehicle counts, average delays, and corridor-level performance metrics.
